channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Palmer Luckey’s retro gaming startup ModRetro reportedly seeks funding at $1B valuation
item.description: The company launched its first product, a Game Boy-style handheld device called the Chromatic, in 2024.

item.title: 12 of the best sleep-hacking gadgets to help you get the best rest of your life — by a former Sleep Editor
item.description: It's Sleep Awareness Week, and that's a good a time as any to sort out your slumber.
